codeReview.summary: The fix correctly updates TextMate grammar patterns to accept lowercase IDs. Changed 4 patterns from [A-Z] to [A-Za-z] for screen-ids and state-ids sections (both PascalCase and camelCase variants).

summary: The implementation correctly fixes the grammar to accept lowercase IDs. The diff shows 4 regex patterns were updated: SCREEN-[A-Z]→SCREEN-[A-Za-z], Screen-[A-Z]→Screen-[A-Za-z], STATE-[A-Z]→STATE-[A-Za-z], and State-[A-Z]→State-[A-Za-z]. Samples using lowercase IDs like SCREEN-board and SCREEN-dashboard will now be correctly syntax highlighted. The grammar pattern [A-Za-z][A-Za-z0-9_-]+ aligns with the schema's [A-Za-z][a-zA-Z0-9]* requirement for the first character after the prefix. No blocking issues found.
